hero.bio: I architect scalable systems, automate the mundane, and orchestrate intelligent agents — one commit at a time.

about.headline: I Build Things That Live on the Internet
paragraphs: Fresh out of engineering with a head full of ideas and hands ready to build. I specialize in the MERN stack, cloud infrastructure on Azure, and building automation pipelines that make systems smarter.
I believe great software is invisible — it just works, scales, and never gets in the user's way. My approach combines solid engineering fundamentals with modern DevOps practices.
When I'm not writing code, I'm designing automation workflows in n8n, exploring AI agent frameworks, or contributing to open source.

projects.title: AutoFlow AI
projects.tagline: Intelligent n8n-powered automation platform with AI decision nodes
projects.description: A production-grade automation platform built on n8n with custom AI agent nodes. Orchestrates multi-step workflows connecting APIs, databases, and AI models with zero manual intervention.

projects.title: DevDeploy Dashboard
projects.tagline: CI/CD pipeline visualizer and deployment manager
projects.description: A React-based dashboard that integrates with GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps to provide a unified view of all pipelines, deployments, and rollback capabilities.

projects.title: MERNmart
projects.tagline: Full-featured e-commerce platform on MERN stack
projects.description: End-to-end e-commerce solution with JWT auth, Stripe payments, Redis caching, admin panel, order management, and containerized deployment.

projects.title: CloudGuard API
projects.tagline: Secure REST API with Azure-native authentication
projects.description: A hardened Node.js REST API using Azure AD for identity, Azure Key Vault for secrets, rate limiting, and full OpenAPI documentation.

process.title: Discover & Define
process.description: Deep research before touching any code. Understanding the real problem, the users, constraints, and defining clear success metrics.

process.title: Architect
process.description: System design blueprints — database schemas, API contracts, component trees, and infrastructure topology. Everything mapped before building.

process.title: Build
process.description: Clean, modular, documented code. Feature branches, atomic commits, and regular code reviews. No shortcuts on fundamentals.

process.title: Test & Harden
process.description: Unit tests, integration tests, edge cases, and security audits. A feature isn't done until it's proven to handle what it shouldn't.

process.title: Deploy & Automate
process.description: Containerized deployments via Docker, CI/CD pipelines on Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions, zero-downtime blue-green deployments.

process.title: Monitor & Iterate
process.description: Structured logging, performance metrics, alerting. Every deployment is the beginning of the next improvement cycle.

principles.title: Automate Everything
principles.description: If I do something twice, I automate it the third time. Repetition is a bug in the workflow.

principles.title: Ship, Then Improve
principles.description: Working software today beats perfect software never. Iterate in production with real feedback.

principles.title: Code is Communication
principles.description: Code is written for humans first, machines second. Clarity beats cleverness every time.

principles.title: Security is Not Optional
principles.description: Secure by design, not by afterthought. Every endpoint, every secret, every dependency matters.

principles.title: Document While Building
principles.description: Documentation written in retrospect is always incomplete. Write it while the context is fresh.

principles.title: Fail Fast, Learn Faster
principles.description: Bugs and failures are data. The goal is to surface them early and extract every lesson.

principles.title: Build for Scale
principles.description: Design for 10x the current load. Bottlenecks discovered in production are 100x more expensive.

principles.title: Own Your Stack
principles.description: Understand every layer — from DNS to React render cycles. Black boxes become liabilities.

journey.title: Started Engineering
journey.description: Enrolled in B.E. Computer Science. Wrote my first `hello world` in C.

journey.title: Discovered JavaScript
journey.description: Fell in love with building things in the browser. React clicked immediately.

journey.title: First Full-Stack Project
journey.description: Built a complete MERN app — a task manager with auth, CRUD, and deployment.

journey.title: Went Deep on MERN
journey.description: Mastered MongoDB aggregations, Express middleware patterns, and React state management.

journey.title: Entered DevOps World
journey.description: First Docker container. First CI/CD pipeline. First time sleeping well knowing deployments were automated.

journey.title: Azure Certification Path
journey.description: Started studying Azure fundamentals. Deployed production workloads to the cloud for the first time.

journey.title: Automation with n8n
journey.description: Discovered n8n — built complex multi-step workflows connecting 10+ services without writing boilerplate.

journey.title: AI Agent Orchestration
journey.description: Started exploring LangChain, agent frameworks, and building AI-powered automation nodes.

journey.title: Graduated — B.E. Computer Science
journey.description: Completed engineering degree. Ready to turn four years of learning into real-world impact.

journey.title: Open to Opportunities
journey.description: Actively looking for my first professional role. Ready to contribute, learn, and grow on day one.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something Together
contact.subtext: Whether it's a project, a job opportunity, or just a conversation — I'm all ears.
